calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion Amd Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff People of the State of California's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim granted. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Jcc Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.
